The fix has been applied correctly. Here's a summary of what was done:

**Migration rule applied**: `sd-cf-textinputgroup-textinputgroup-req-wrap`

**Change**: The `<TextInputGroupMain>` component at line 196 was a direct child of `<TextInputGroup>`. It is now wrapped in its own `<TextInputGroupUtilities>` block (lines 196-212).

**Structure before:**

<TextInputGroup isPlain>

    <Button ... />

</TextInputGroup>
```

**Structure after:**
```tsx
<TextInputGroup isPlain>
  <TextInputGroupUtilities>          ← new wrapper
    <TextInputGroupMain ... />
  </TextInputGroupUtilities>
  <TextInputGroupUtilities>
    <Button ... />
  </TextInputGroupUtilities>
</TextInputGroup>
```

**No cleanup needed**: `TextInputGroupUtilities` was already imported and still used, so no import changes were required. No dead code was introduced.
